creator: achilov-rn@askd.ru
text:
Port graphics/djvulibre required bash, but when comment it, port finished
build and install succesfully and run without problems. Why this port needs
bash, and when I'll miss, when continue to use it with commented bash
requirement line?

Fix: 

Comment line, requied bash
How-To-Repeat: Comment line, required bash in graphics/djvulibre port
Build and install it, and try to use. All OK. Which bash need here for?
